description: Symbolic seed library defining seed types, growth patterns, and shape mappings. Seeds are minimal viable units of regenerative intelligence that unfold through Rosetta shape geometry.

seed_types.name: Structural Seed
seed_types.description: Encodes a containment pattern that can regenerate lost boundaries. Germinates into cubic closure.

seed_types.name: Catalytic Seed
seed_types.description: Carries activation energy for triggering regeneration cascades. Minimal tetrahedral spark.

seed_types.name: Integrative Seed
seed_types.description: Reconnects severed pathways by encoding bridge states across octahedral vertices.

seed_types.name: Wisdom Seed
seed_types.description: Long-dormancy seed carrying principle-level regeneration. Restores dodecahedral coherence after deep damage.

constraint: Seeds obey ENERGY_CONSERVATION. Growth energy must come from an identified source — no spontaneous generation.
